PD
SETPC :C

SETPC 48

SETPC 40 + :D
ARC 28 :L * 0.18
SETPC 48
BK :L
END

SETPC 61
ARC 36 :R
RT 36
SETPC 45
ARC 22 :R * 0.72
LT 18
]
SETPW 2
SETPC 63
CIRCLE :R * 0.25
END

TO LEAFSPIRAL :LEN :ANG :STEP :THICK
  IF :LEN < 2 [STOP]
  SETPW :THICK
  SETPC 15 + (:LEN / 12)
  FD :LEN
  RT :ANG
  LEAFSPIRAL :LEN * .95 :ANG + 0.8 :STEP :THICK * .985
END

TO VINE :LEN :WID :DEPTH
  IF :DEPTH = 0 [STOP]
  SETPW :WID
  SETPC 20 + :DEPTH * 2
  REPEAT 18 [
    FD :LEN / 18
    LT 3 + (:DEPTH / 2)
    RT 1
  ]
  PU
  FD :LEN / 5
  PD
  LT 28
  LEAFSPIRAL :LEN / 1.8 23 1 :WID * .8
  RT 56
  PU
  BK :LEN / 5
  PD
  LT 20
  VINE :LEN * .88 :WID * .85 :DEPTH - 1
  RT 20
  PU
  FD :LEN / 3
  PD
END

TO BLOOM :R :P
  SETPW 1
  REPEAT 36 [
    SETPC 45 + :P * 2
    ARC :R / 2 10
    RT 170
    ARC :R / 3 6
    LT 160
    RT 10
  ]
END

TO ORBIT :R :N :C
  SETPW 1
  REPEAT :N [
    SETPC :C + REPCOUNT
    PU
    FD :R
    PD
    CIRCLE 1 + (REPCOUNT / 10)
    PU
    BK :R
    PD
    RT 360 / :N
  ]
END

TO ROOTS :LEN :DEPTH
  IF :DEPTH = 0 [STOP]
  SETPW :DEPTH
  SETPC 25 + :DEPTH
  FD :LEN
  LT 18
  ROOTS :LEN * .78 :DEPTH - 1
  RT 36
  ROOTS :LEN * .72 :DEPTH - 1
  LT 18
  BK :LEN
END

OUTPUT FORMAT - CRITICAL: return ONLY variant blocks:
---VARIANT 1---
[complete Logo code]
---VARIANT 2---

MAGNITUDE RULE: The STRICT MAGNITUDE CONSTRAINT in the user message is absolute. Magnitude 1: change exactly one number. Magnitude 2: change 2-3 numbers. Magnitude 3: change several parameters or add one simple command. Never add new procedures or structural changes at magnitudes 1-3.

COMPLETENESS RULE: Every variant MUST be a complete, runnable Logo program. Verify: (1) every [ has a matching ]; (2) every TO has a matching END; (3) the last line is complete. Do NOT include ANY reasoning, thinking, or commentary inside variant blocks.

Commands: FD BK RT LT PU PD HOME CS REPEAT n [ ] TO name :p (body) END MAKE "var val :var SETHEADING SETXY SETPC SETPENCOLOR SETPENSIZE SETWIDTH SETBG ARC CIRCLE DOT IF IFELSE WHILE FOR SIN COS SQRT RANDOM INT ABS MOD MAX MIN REPCOUNT OUTPUT STOP

Canvas 400x400, origin center, North=up. FINITE programs. TO...END before calling. Under 60 lines.

MAGNITUDE RULE: The STRICT MAGNITUDE CONSTRAINT in the user message is absolute. Magnitude 1: change exactly one number. Magnitude 2: change 2-3 numbers. Magnitude 3: change several parameters or add one simple command. Never add new procedures or structural changes at magnitudes 1-3.
